title: OpenEPCIS EUDR Vocabulary Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating EU Deforestation Regulation (2023/1115) compliance data. Version 0.9.5.

CommodityType.title: Commodity Type
CommodityType.description: The seven commodities regulated by EUDR (EU 2023/1115, Article 1.1).

RiskLevel.title: Risk Level
RiskLevel.description: Risk classification levels per EUDR benchmarking system (Article 29).

TimberProductType.title: Timber Product Type
TimberProductType.description: Types of timber/wood products regulated by EUDR Annex I.

ActorRole.title: Actor Role
ActorRole.description: Role of an actor in the EUDR supply chain per Article 2.

OriginDeclaration.title: Origin Declaration
OriginDeclaration.description: EUDR origin declaration data for EPCIS events.

harvestDate.description: The harvest date (use when single date). Mutually exclusive with harvestDateStart/End.

eoriNumber.description: Economic Operators Registration and Identification number.

partyGLN.description: 13-digit GLN identifying the legal entity of the declaring party.

customsCommodityCode.description: Customs commodity code. Use customsCommodityCodeType to indicate the classification system (HS, CN, HTSUS).

deforestationFreeDate.description: Date confirming deforestation-free status. Must be after 31 Dec 2020 cutoff.

legallyHarvested.description: Confirmation that commodity was legally harvested per country of production laws.

OriginDetails.title: Origin Details
OriginDetails.description: Container for geolocation and producer identification.

geolocation.description: Geographic coordinates as Geo URI (RFC 5870). Use for plots <= 4 hectares.

geofence.description: Area polygon as array of longitude-latitude coordinates per CBV 2.0, 9.3.1. Use for plots > 4 hectares.

unitCode.description: UN/CEFACT Rec. 20 unit code (e.g., HAR for hectares).

speciesScientificName.description: Scientific (Latin) name of the species. Required per EUDR Article 9.1.c.

forestManagementUnit.description: Identifier of forest management unit or concession.

landUseHistory.description: Description of land use history supporting deforestation-free claims.
